text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I was a child, my dream was to be the very
best racer.

text_block_list.name: Human Girl
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... wheeze...

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
You're too slow, Etsie! Hurry up or I'll leave you
behind!

text_block_list.name: Human Girl
text_block_list.text: W-wait up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not once was I able to catch up to my friend.
Seeing her tail flit about so far ahead, I felt the
limits of being human, and my pride was
shattered to pieces.

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Woohoo! I win!

text_block_list.name: Human Girl
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... wheeze...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It was so frustrating. The simple fact that I was
human put an unbreakable ceiling on my
potential. I couldn't stand the absurdity of it all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But still, I found my friend's running more
captivating than anything in the world...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In my young mind, I believed that she was the
fastest, the strongest, and the most beautiful.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At least, that's what I wanted to believe.

text_block_list.name: Human Girl
text_block_list.text:
Is it true? Are you really quitting the kids' racing
club?

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I promised my mom I'd quit if I didn't win
yesterday's race and become club leader...

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
...You supported me all this time, Etsie. Sorry I let
you down...

text_block_list.name: Human Girl
text_block_list.text: B-but you won so many times! Then you come in second place once and this is what happens?!

text_block_list.name: Human Girl
text_block_list.text: Sure, our new leader's fast, and she's finished first in a bunch of big races... but I know you're better than her!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
...Maybe. Her record's not perfect. And she didn't
even hit the board plenty of times.

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, I... sometimes I think I'm better
than her too! But... but...

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
She won yesterday! ...She pulls through when it
really counts. That's why I have no choice but to
accept it.

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
The other club members, the teachers... They've
all embraced her as leader. Everyone feels the
same way!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
...My mom was against me becoming a racer from
the very beginning. If I'm not the best in the club,
I'm not allowed to keep running.

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: And I didn't win yesterday! ...So it's all over!

text_block_list.name: Human Girl
text_block_list.text: W-wait!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I knew how talented she truly was. I knew it
better than anyone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I was jealous of her. I fixated on her, studied
her—but I couldn't beat her. She crushed me
every time, so I knew exactly how good she was.

text_block_list.name: Human Girl
text_block_list.text: I said wait!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What if club leader tryouts weren't a one-time
only deal?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Like in baseball, how teams play multiple times to
find out who's really the best.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As that same thought ran through my mind over
and over... I realized that I never once wavered in
my belief that my friend was the strongest.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: (That's why... That's why I...)

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Greetings to everyone watching this special broadcast! I'm Otonashi from Twinkle Monthly.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
This broadcast is being brought to you live across
different platforms through various media outlets.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
To all our viewers watching online, we'll be
responding to your questions and comments, so
be sure to send yours in!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, it started! Pretty incredible how they stream
this stuff on Umasta.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
I saw on TV and online that there's going to be
some sort of important announcement. Wonder
what it could be...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I pass by the station, I see that a large crowd
has gathered.

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, they're showing something on the station
jumbotron.

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
There's apparently a big announcement today. I
saw a full-page ad about it in the sports paper.

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I saw it in a racing magazine! That same ad's
been in all the magazines recently, right?
choice_data_list: (I wonder what all this fuss could be about...)

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Now without further delay, let's get straight to
the matter at hand.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: I, Etsuko Otonashi, along with Twinkle Monthly and all the other media outlets that love Umamusume...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Would like to formally announce a brand-new
race series—the Twinkle Star Climax!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: This race series is a media-led initiative made possible with the cooperation of Twinkle Monthly and several other news organizations!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, it looks like we have a comment from a
Tracen Academy student. Thank you for your
question!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
"I'm really looking forward to the new race series!
What makes a media-led initiative special when
compared to regular races?"

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Excellent question! Now, my explanation here
may come across as presumptuous to some.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
But that's exactly why I'd like you all to hear me
out! The Twinkle Star Climax...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Will be the series to decide the greatest
Umamusume of them all!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Of course, this will be just one vision, determined
by us in the media, of what it means to be the
"greatest."

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
But when all of you watching this broadcast think
of the "greatest," which runner immediately
comes to mind?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Well, well.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
What is it, Brian? Has this new race series piqued
your interest?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Maybe. Depends what else they have to say.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
...The Derby Umamusume, perhaps? The Triple
Crown champion?

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
An undefeated runner? Or perhaps one who raced
at the highest level for the longest time?

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: For this race series, we're defining the "greatest" as the Umamusume who can prove her strength most consistently!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Prove her strength consistently, huh?

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Take, for example, the Japanese Derby, a race
which can only be run once in a lifetime.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Those who set their sights on the Derby put
everything on the line, working to put even luck
itself on their side.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
The winner of such a race is, without doubt, the
"greatest" in one sense.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
However, luck is undeniably a factor in how any
one race plays out. And while no what-if scenarios
are recorded in the history books...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: What if that race could be redone? I'm sure the thought has crossed everyone's mind at least once, yes?

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: I, too, have entertained such hypotheticals. And that is precisely why...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
The Twinkle Star Climax will utilize a
points-based system!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
A carefully selected lineup of talented runners
will compete three times under identical
conditions to earn points determined by their
placing.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
What's more, there will be races to cover every
category you can think of—sprint, mile, medium,
long, dirt...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
In short, this series requires that runners
consistently prove their strength by fighting their
way to the top multiple times!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Heh... This sure is a big-time series.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Even if I set my sights on Oguri and enter the
same races as her, there's no tellin' what everyone
else is gonna do.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: So I'm in your sights...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
It was just a hypothetical! Don't go readin' too
much into it!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What I'm tryin' to say is, we'll be able to do stuff
in this series that we couldn't up till now.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
That's true. We can have three different
after-parties.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Not dat kinda stuff! Quit it with da quips! ...What
I mean is there'll be more room for counter strats.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
After the first race, everyone's gonna know each
other's game plans. There won't be as many
openings to exploit.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Luck won't matter and bluffs won't work. It's
gonna be a contest of pure ability.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
So that's why this series is supposed to prove who
the greatest is? I get it now. You're good at
explaining things, Tama.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The reporter is basically saying the same thing, so
I'm sure you've got the right idea.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
"As such, this series will reduce the luck factor to
a minimum, resulting in a contest of pure ability."

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What?! She was sayin' da exact same stuff as me
da whole time?! My explanation was pointless!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
To all viewers across Japan, I present the
question to you once again.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Are you ready to find out, once and for all, who
the greatest really is?!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Are you ready for more promotion than ever?
More cameras than ever? Racing on a scale like
you've never seen before?

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Well I am, so I say it's time to decide the greatest
Umamusume of all time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd on the street is swept into an uproar.
Just then, as the word "greatest" is sparking the
imaginations of everyone around me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzt! Bzzt!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
"Greetings, Trainer! Were you watching that
broadcast? Return to the academy at once!
Posthaste!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After hurrying over to Director Akikawa's office, I
listen to what she and Tazuna have to say.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
...And so, here at Tracen Academy, we'll be doing
everything in our power to facilitate this new race
series!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
That said, doing so should be quite simple! And
also exceedingly difficult! If you continue your
heroic exploits in the Twinkle Series...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Then eventually you will receive a letter of
invitation to the Twinkle Star Climax!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Let's do our very best as we aim to enter the new
series, Trainer. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Essentially, they want me to push onward in order
to make an impact on the grandest stage of the
era—the Twinkle Star Climax!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Trainer <username>! Do you
have a moment?
choice_data_list:
Sure... Ah, you're that reporter from the
broadcast!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Oh, so you were watching? I'm Etsuko Otonashi, a reporter for Twinkle Monthly.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to offer my personal thanks for Tracen
Academy's immense support.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
And I'm expecting great things from your trainee
as a potential contender in the Twinkle Star
Climax!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
No need to be modest. I've heard you're the
up-and-comer Director Akikawa has such high
expectations for.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Now, could you please share your thoughts as you
aim to compete for the title of the "greatest"?
choice_data_list: I, uh... I'll give it my all!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Simply amazing! The resolve to exhaust every
ounce of effort from every fiber in your body to
bestow the title of "greatest" upon your partner!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: That was so moving I lost my composure!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: I simply must publish an article on you!
choice_data_list: (This is starting to get a little out of hand!)
(This is starting to get a little out of hand!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, there's little doubt that entering the
Twinkle Star Climax would be a great honor.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If <chrname> dreams of one day
holding the title of the "greatest," then it might
be a challenge worth taking up!
